title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Oberoi Realty - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Oberoi Realty - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Oberoi Realty has an exciting opening for a Sales Manager at our Rajkot office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Oberoi Realty:
Oberoi Realty is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oberoi Realty!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
